name: SCAYLE
scope: Leading checkout with a backend and platform focus inside a commerce platform processing more than EUR 6.5B yearly.
highlights: Led checkout through Black Friday 2025 peak tenants at roughly 550 orders per minute with zero downtime in the domain I was responsible for.
Owned the cleanup of noisy monitoring and on-call signal so incidents became easier to trust, triage, and sleep through.
Promoted into the lead role after pushing design docs, proposals, and reliability improvements that changed how the team operated.
responsibilities: Leading checkout execution across architecture, delivery, and operational quality.
Owning on-call quality and observability for payment-critical flows.
Designing pipeline-based state changes for complex checkout mutations triggered by a single user action.
projects: SCAYLE Commerce Engine - platform powering Harrods, Deichmann, s.Oliver, Manchester United, and 100+ brands

name: SCAYLE
scope: Hands-on backend engineer on checkout, working on throughput, reliability, and multi-tenant commerce behavior.
highlights: Helped rebuild checkout from a legacy implementation into a Laravel and RoadRunner architecture with clearer flow control.
Took on checkout on-call, which pushed me deep into observability, error reduction, and production debugging.
responsibilities: Building and tuning high-throughput checkout flows for multi-tenant commerce.
Handling incidents and runtime behavior in payment-critical systems.
Contributing to headless checkout capabilities used across multiple brands.

name: anwalt.de

responsibilities: Owning delivery across backend, DevOps, and technical direction.
Improving CI/CD and deployment safety with the DevOps team.
Mentoring engineers and raising the quality bar through code review and shared engineering practices.

name: anwalt.de

Migrating legacy code into more maintainable services and flows.
